## Summary

## Scope

- [ ] .NET Core API
- [ ] Spring Boot Support API
- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Database/docs

## Checks

- [ ] API paths keep `/api/core`, `/api/support`, or `/api/public`
- [ ] Schema changes are owned by .NET EF Core migrations
- [ ] Spring Boot keeps `ddl-auto=validate`
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Docs/Postman updated if API or schema changed
